title: Blue Thermos Eco Cool 6 Can Cool Bag (111416)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Insulated with 4mm IsoTec premium closed PE foam
Thermos branded Stainless Steel zipper pull
description: The Eco Cool bag is designed with sustainable living at the core. The outer fabric of this 3L/6 can bag is made from 8 recycled Pet plastic bottles, so you can enjoy fresh food and drinks whilst contributing to saving the Earth’s natural resources. Created with the Thermos quality and performance you can rely on, this cool bag is picnic ready.
